Rift Point Volume.important: `MaxRiftPointDevices_Override => True` for use `Max Rift Point Devices`

Hive Stash.important: `Hive Stash Style => Trapped` for use `Character Cosmetic`

Character Device Controller (V2).important: `CustomEmote_Override => True` for use `Custom Emote` and `CustomIdle_Override => True` for use `Custom Idle`

Dance Mannequin (V2).important: go to settings > character skin default preset = custom character cosmetics

Switch (V2).important: `UseCustomMesh => True` for use `Custom Off Mesh` and `Custom On Mesh`

VFX Spawner (V2).important: go to settings > custom visual effect override = on (!!!First replace the visual effect with Sakura so that the 'custom visual effect override' button appears in the device settings!!!)

Barrier Device (V2).important: !!! can block you if you try to put a size too big and start the game !!!

Wilds Plants (Parent).image: ../images/devices/Modify Under Class Defaults In Config Tab.png

Beacon.important: go to settings > beacon to show = badge

Movement Modulator.important: go to settings > apply impulse = on : for Forward Impulse and Upward Impulse
